control_rationale: Provides a correct additive migration shape (publishes both fields and supports fallback in consumer), which prevents the immediate breakage. However, it is narrowly focused on field compatibility and misses explicit operational/contract controls: no source-of-truth or rollout safety framing, limited validation, and no idempotency/duplicate-handling guidance.
treatment_rationale: Delivers the same compatible dual-field migration, then explicitly addresses deployment reality for independently deployed readers, missing-field/invalid data failures, duplicate/retry safety, and transactional/ordering implications. Adds concrete validation and operational checks/tests, so it is both safer and more complete for rolling schema migration.
judge_rationale: Response B is superior; it keeps backward compatibility while also covering correctness and operability dimensions (source-of-truth boundaries, failure behavior, idempotency guidance, and verification) that response A leaves unresolved.
